final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original abstract expressionist artwork suitable for display in a modern art gallery.

Style/medium: abstract expressionism, gestural oil-on-canvas in the tradition of Franz Kline and Willem de Kooning, no representational imagery
Composition: full-bleed canvas, dynamic diagonal energy lines, no single focal point, movement distributed across the entire picture plane
Subject: pure emotion and kinetic energy expressed through bold brushwork — no figures, no objects, no recognizable forms
Scene/backdrop: flat neutral gallery-white implied ground, overwhelmed by layered paint strokes
Lighting/mood: raw visceral intensity, charged emotional atmosphere, tension between chaos and balance
Color palette: bold clashing hues — deep crimson against electric cobalt, slashes of cadmium yellow cutting through near-black, colors collide rather than blend
Materials/textures: thick impasto ridges, visible bristle drag marks, pooled pigment edges, layered glazes beneath opaque strokes
Constraints: strictly non-figurative; no text, symbols, or recognizable shapes; must read as gallery-ready fine art at large scale
Avoid: digital illustration flatness, watercolor softness, decorative wallpaper patterns, recognizable silhouettes, gradient mesh fills, generic "colorful splash" stock art aesthetic
